subtitle_en: Can you spot the relative clause?
subtitle_zh: Can you spot the relative clause?
description_en: Find the relative clause in each sentence
description_zh: Find the relative clause in each sentence
description_es: Encuentra la cláusula relativa en cada oración

description_en: who/that as the subject — followed directly by a verb
description_zh: who/that as the subject — followed directly by a verb
description_es: who/that como sujeto — seguido por un verbo

description_en: The relative pronoun receives the action
description_zh: The relative pronoun receives the action
description_es: El pronombre relativo recibe la acción

description_en: If the clause already has a subject, the relative pronoun is the object
description_zh: If the clause already has a subject, the relative pronoun is the object
description_es: Si la cláusula ya tiene sujeto, el pronombre es objeto

description_en: where = place, when = time, why = reason
description_zh: where = place, when = time, why = reason
description_es: where = lugar, when = tiempo, why = razón

description_en: whose = his/her/its/their — works for people AND things
description_zh: whose = his/her/its/their — works for people AND things
description_es: whose = su/sus — para personas Y cosas

description_en: No comma = restrictive (essential). Comma = non-restrictive (extra info)
description_zh: No comma = restrictive (essential). Comma = non-restrictive (extra info)
description_es: Sin coma = restrictiva. Con coma = no restrictiva

description_en: Merge two sentences using relative clauses
description_zh: Merge two sentences using relative clauses
description_es: Une dos oraciones con cláusulas relativas

name_zh: In / On / At — 空间介词
description_en: in = inside, on = surface, at = specific point
description_zh: in = inside, on = surface, at = specific point
description_es: in = dentro, on = superficie, at = punto específico

name_zh: In / On / At — 时间介词
description_en: at = specific time, on = day, in = longer period
description_zh: at = specific time, on = day, in = longer period
description_es: at = hora, on = día, in = período largo

name_zh: 时间 + 空间 混练
description_en: Decide: is it place or time?
description_zh: Decide: is it place or time?
